## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run script '...'
2. With parameters '....'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Error output
```
Paste error logs, stack traces, or console output here
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14.0]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.5]
- Script version: [e.g. scripts/01_fetch_signatures.py]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here (screenshots, sample data, etc.).

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I have included error output
- [ ] I have provided reproduction steps
- [ ] I have verified this is not an environment-specific issue
